findings.description: Visual symbols in the map legend were lost during extraction.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the legend contains specific graphical icons (e.g., a blue diamond, colored lines, colored outlines) paired with text to identify map features. In the HTML, the legend has been extracted as a text-only unordered list, omitting the visual symbols. This makes it impossible for the reader to associate the text descriptions with the features shown on the map.
